title: Car mechanic for Seinäjoki
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: You can be at the beginning of your career or already an experienced professional. The most important thing is that you have automotive training and a brisk and self-initiated approach to work.
At least a basic degree in the automotive industry or a similar education
Want to learn new things and develop your skills
Previous experience as a car mechanic
Duties of a basic auto mechanic at a multi-brand repair shop
what_we_offer: The possibility of a longer employment relationship
The support of a friendly and competent team
Salary in accordance with the TES of the workshop industry

Submit your application via the application link as soon as possible, we will process applications already during the application period. Please note that we only process applications received through the system.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a car mechanic for our client in Seinäjoki.
You can be at the beginning of your career or already an experienced professional. The most important thing is that you have automotive training and a brisk and self-initiated approach to work.

We offer long-term and full-time work (37.5 h/week) as soon as a suitable person is found.

We expect from you
- At least a basic degree in the automotive industry or a similar education
- Want to learn new things and develop your skills
- Active and energetic attitude

We look forward to it
- Air conditioning qualification
- SFS 6002 electrical work safety card
- Previous experience as a car mechanic

Job duties
- Duties of a basic car mechanic at a multi-brand repair shop
- Working hours from 08:00 to 16:00

We offer you
- Work in modern multi-brand maintenance
- The possibility of a longer employment relationship
- The support of a friendly and competent team
- Salary in accordance with the TES of the workshop industry

How do I apply?
Submit your application via the application link as soon as possible, we will process applications already during the application period. Please note that we only process applications received through the system.

More information: from Janne on 0452701114

Eezy helps its customers succeed by quickly providing the best experts for changing situations nationwide. Personnel leasing, recruitment, light entrepreneurship and our other expert services in working life offer the most versatile ways to meet work and people.
We want to build a diverse and equal Eezy. We welcome applications from qualified applicants from all kinds of backgrounds. We always follow an equal and transparent recruitment process. We believe that diversity is not only an asset of our corporate culture, but also a source of the best results.

title: Excavator driver.
what_we_expect: keep heavy construction equipment in good condition
jobcontent:
We are looking for a motivated and independent machine operator to join our young team. 

The work mainly consists of renovation projects, so experience in that field is considered an advantage. 
You don't have to be a complete professional, but you must be able to work carefully and systematically on the site.

You can submit a free-form application by email to: teemu@maanrakennushuuskonen.fi 
Or call: 0400 748594 

The position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

The best time to reach out by phone is on weekdays from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m 
Photos of the products of your own work are desirable.
translated_content:
Excavator driver.

We are looking for a motivated and independent machine operator to join our young team. 

The work mainly consists of renovation projects, so experience in that field is considered an advantage. 
You don't have to be a complete professional, but you must be able to work carefully and systematically on the site.

You can submit a free-form application by email to: teemu@maanrakennushuuskonen.fi 
Or call: 0400 748594 

The position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

The best time to reach out by phone is on weekdays from 7 a.m. to 6 p.m 
Photos of the products of your own work are desirable.

title: IVF laboratory nurse
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: carry out laboratory analyzes on fertility
examine cell samples under a microscope
what_we_offer: The start will be agreed separately, and the task will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a full-time, permanent IVF laboratory nurse to join our team in our Helsinki clinic.

**Your Mission**

As an IVF laboratory nurse, you work in a central role in the patient's care chain and participate versatilely in the operation of the fertilization treatment laboratory in accordance with tissue institution requirements. The work includes tasks in both the embryo and andrology laboratory in close cooperation with the entire treatment team.

· the tasks of the andrology laboratory

oocyte processing and freezing (vitrification)

· cultivation, classification, selection and freezing of embryos

· IVF and ICSI procedures

· documentation and reporting

· cooperation with the treatment team and patient communication

Work assignments can be modified according to your skills and experience.

**Required**

· suitable education (e.g. bioanalyst/laboratory nurse)

· experience in IVF laboratory work

· good knowledge of embryology and aseptic working

· experience working in a quality system and following SOP instructions

· accuracy, flexibility and ability to work in changing situations

· excellent teamwork skills

· readiness for weekend work

**We offer**

A responsible and versatile job description and the opportunity to develop as an expert in the fertility treatment laboratory. You get to work with Ovumia's top professionals in an innovative and international work environment. Your work is of great importance in the lives of our patients. Salary is determined by basic education and work experience.

The start will be agreed separately, and the task will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

**Short summary in English**

Ovumia is looking for an Embryologist (Laboratory Technician) to join our team in Helsinki, Finland. This is a full-time, permanent on-site role. We expect relevant education, previous experience in an IVF laboratory, and strong embryology skills. Please send your application to umkemet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF laboratory nurse".

Ovumia is the leading clinic chain in Finland and the Nordic countries specializing in fertilization treatments. We offer the most advanced fertilization treatment and care in Helsinki, Tampere, Jyväskylä and Kuopio. Ovumia is an expert in egg and sperm donation treatments and embryo diagnostics. More than 16,000 babies have been born to our customers.

**Applying**

We ask that you send your application, curriculum vitae and salary expectations no later than 28 April 2026 to the address: umkemet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF laboratory nurse".

Unfortunately, we are unable to respond to inquiries, but we are in contact with each applicant during the application process.

Please send your application to umkemet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF laboratory nurse".

title: Chef
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: maintains a clean, hygienic and safe working environment
take care of the correct temperature of the kitchen appliances
jobcontent:
Profession Chuancai an Asian chef who can independently prepare a menu of Asian dishes

foods. Can handle raw materials in a food hygiene manner and can manage the kitchen independently

daily activities. Takes care of the daily cleanliness of the kitchen. To do

cooperation with other kitchen staff.
translated_content:
Chef

Profession Chuancai an Asian chef who can independently prepare a menu of Asian dishes

foods. Can handle raw materials in a food hygiene manner and can manage the kitchen independently

daily activities. Takes care of the daily cleanliness of the kitchen. To do

cooperation with other kitchen staff.

title: IVF biologist
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: carry out laboratory analyzes on fertility
examine cell samples under a microscope
what_we_offer: The start will be agreed separately, and the task will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a full-time, permanent IVF biologist to join our team in our Helsinki clinic.

**Your Mission**

As an IVF biologist, you work in a central role in the patient's care chain and participate versatilely in the operation of the fertilization treatment laboratory in accordance with tissue institution requirements. The work includes tasks in both the embryo and andrology laboratory in close cooperation with the entire treatment team.

· the tasks of the andrology laboratory

oocyte processing and freezing (vitrification)

· cultivation, classification, selection and freezing of embryos

· IVF and ICSI procedures

· documentation and reporting

· cooperation with the treatment team and patient communication

Work assignments can be modified according to your skills and experience.

**Required**

· suitable education (e.g. biologist, biotechnologist, biotechnology engineer)

· experience in IVF laboratory work

· good knowledge of embryology and aseptic working

· experience working in a quality system and following SOP instructions

· accuracy, flexibility and ability to work in changing situations

· excellent teamwork skills

· readiness for weekend work

**We offer**

A responsible and versatile job description and the opportunity to develop as an expert in the fertility treatment laboratory. You get to work with Ovumia's top professionals in an innovative and international work environment. Your work is of great importance in the lives of our patients. Salary is determined by basic education and work experience.

The start will be agreed separately, and the task will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

**Short summary in English**

Ovumia is looking for an Embryologist (IVF Biologist) to join our team in Helsinki, Finland. This is a full-time, permanent on-site role. We expect relevant education, previous experience in an IVF laboratory, and strong embryology skills. Please send your application to hakemeet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF biologist".

Ovumia is the leading clinic chain in Finland and the Nordic countries specializing in fertilization treatments. We offer the most advanced fertilization treatment and care in Helsinki, Tampere, Jyväskylä and Kuopio. Ovumia is an expert in egg and sperm donation treatments and embryo diagnostics. More than 16,000 babies have been born to our customers.

**Applying**

Please send your application, curriculum vitae and salary expectations by April 28, 2026 at the latest to the address: umkemet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF-biologist".

Unfortunately, we are unable to respond to inquiries, but we are in contact with each applicant during the application process.

Please send your application to hakemeet@ovumia.fi with the title "IVF biologist".
